Auth._comment: API key guarding all /api controllers. Empty string = OPEN (no auth). Set a key to require it via 'X-Api-Key', 'Authorization: Bearer <key>', or '?apiKey='. Put the real key in the git-ignored appsettings.Development.json.

AwoxBle._comment: SECRETS (MeshName/MeshPassword/MeshKey/GatewayMac/Devices) live in appsettings.Development.json, which is git-ignored. Copy appsettings.Development.example.json to appsettings.Development.json and fill in your mesh credentials.
